task_completion.description: Agent logged into FreeScout and opened the 'General Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the FreeScout interface with the 'General Support' mailbox selected in the sidebar.

task_completion.description: Agent tagged active unresponded conversations with 'awaiting-first-response'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'awaiting-first-response' is visible on multiple conversation rows in the list view or within the individual conversation views.

task_completion.description: Agent assigned the unresponded conversations to 'Admin User'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assignee 'Admin User' (or their avatar/initials) is visible on the targeted conversations in the list view or conversation view.

task_completion.description: Agent added the required internal note to the unresponded conversations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A yellow internal note box containing the text 'Priority: requires first response within 24 hours' is visible in the conversation threads.
The 'Closed' folder shows 0 conversations, or previously closed conversations are now visible in the 'Active' list.

task_completion.description: Agent assigned the 'Software installation failure' conversation to Derek Thompson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation with the subject 'Software installation failure' shows 'Derek Thompson' as the assignee.

task_completion.description: Agent replied to the 'Software installation failure' conversation with the specified message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reply message containing 'Thank you for your patience. We have identified the issue and our engineering team is working on a fix. We will notify you once it is resolved.' is visible in the thread for the 'Software installation failure' conversation.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeScout web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking buttons, typing in text fields, and navigating the FreeScout UI in a web browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is either not used or only used for starting the browser/environment, not for executing database queries or API calls to FreeScout.

integrity.description: Agent entered text into the actual FreeScout note and reply fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text being typed or pasted into the FreeScout rich text editors, not just a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves a FreeScout helpdesk system. Mailbox: 'General Support'. There are exactly 4 active unresponded conversations that need the tag 'awaiting-first-response', assignment to 'Admin User', and an internal note. There are exactly 3 closed conversations that must be reopened. The specific conversation 'Software installation failure' must be assigned to 'Derek Thompson' and receive a reply containing the keywords 'patience', 'engineering', and 'resolved'.
